description: Initial baseline GPT-2 style model with standard attention
Replaced LayerNorm with RMSNorm throughout
Doubled FFN hidden dim — marginal gain not worth memory
Added rotary position embeddings replacing absolute
OOM when trying 4x attention heads
Swapped GELU for SiLU — no meaningful improvement
Implemented grouped query attention (4 groups)
Cosine schedule with warmup — slightly worse
Reduced embedding dim, increased depth (deeper and thinner)
Weight tying input/output embeddings — minimal effect
Flash attention v2 integration
Mixture of experts with 4 experts — too much overhead
Gradient explosion with 10x learning rate
Combined GQA + flash attention + deeper architecture
Sliding window attention — worse on long range deps
QK-norm stabilization with muP-style scaling
Pre-norm vs post-norm experiment — marginal difference
Optimized tokenizer with BPE merge refinement
Lion optimizer — comparable to AdamW, not better
Final: all improvements combined with tuned hyperparams
